name: Carter Park
description: Carter Park is a place to play pickleball in Hastings, NE. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Hastings College
description: There are 2 courts, 1 with permanent nets setup and one with no net.

name: Hastings Community Center
description: Hastings Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hastings, NE. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hastings Family YMCA
description: Hastings Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hastings, NE. There are 4 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Hastings Parks And Rec Building (Armory)
description: Hastings Parks And Rec Building (Armory) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hastings, NE. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Peace Center
description: Peace Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hastings, NE. There are 3 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
